The device has two independent modes: ON1 - the trap activates the anti-shock net at the push of a button - a safe solution for manual use. ON2 - the trap works automatically. The trap is equipped with a rechargeable battery that is charged via USB, so there is no need to change the battery. The LED indicates the operating status and charging status.
